records.ety: [F. thrapeutique, Gr. <?/, from <?/ attendant, servant, <?/ to serve, take care of, treat medically, <?/ attendant, servant.]

defs: Of or pertaining to the healing art; concerned in discovering and applying remedies for diseases; curative.
quotes: Medicine is justly distributed into “prophylactic,” or the art of preserving health, and therapeutic, or the art of restoring it.
